Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: corsets [300210582], underwear and accessories for shaping and supporting [300209268], underwear [300209267], clothing [300266639], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Boned corsets, made in one or two pieces, with or without shoulder straps, that assume a conical form when fastened. Boned corsets, made in one or two pieces, with or without shoulder straps, that assume a conical form when fastened.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Corsé con ballenas, hecho en una o dos piezas, con o sin tirantes, que adopta una forma cónica cuando está abrochado.
Met baleinen verstevigde korsetten, in één of twee delen, met of zonder schouderbanden, die een kegelvorm aannemen wanneer ze worden aangetrokken; gedragen tot de 19e eeuw.

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.; stays
